item.title: Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV loves collaboration beers, but this week is extra special featuring a CANlaboration! Leave it to the craft-beer-in-a-can innovators Oskar Blues Brewery, to team up with Sun King Brewing Company, to produce the first American Craft beer in a re-sealable can!! Chaka is a Belgian Style Ale brewed with Shagbark Hickory Syrup and […]

The post Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues: Deviant Dale’s, Ep. 167
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle a tall boy in a can…a big mean 16oz can! Deviant Dales from Oskar Blues is an outstanding IPA with big flavor and a big attitude to boot . You won’t believe the story behind this beer and you’ll hear it right from the Head Brewer himself, […]

The post Oskar Blues: Deviant Dale’s, Ep. 167 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues: Gordon Goes to Vietnam, Ep. 157
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
While in Vietnam, Beer America TV had the perfect opportunity to pay tribute to Gordon Knight. For those of you who don’t know, Oskar Blues brews a brilliant beer called G’Knight . This beer was inspired buy their good friend and fellow brewer Gordon Knight, who was also a Vietnam Veteran and helicopter pilot. Unfortunately, […]

The post Oskar Blues: Gordon Goes to Vietnam, Ep. 157 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues G’Knight Imperial Red Ale (Gordon) – Ep. 126
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
G’KNIGHT GORDON, a fond farewell from Beer America TV! This week we talk about Gordon Imperial Red Ale from Oskar Blues, but the problem we have is that since we’ve taped this episode, Oskar Blues was forced by Gordon Biersch to change the name of Gordon Ale . So the ever creative folks at Oskar […]

The post Oskar Blues G’Knight Imperial Red Ale (Gordon) – Ep. 126 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 31 – Oskar Blues Ten FIDY Imperial Stout
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
American Craft beer in a can?? You bet, and Oskar Blues brings it in BIG with their seasonal Imperial Stout.

The post Episode 31 – Oskar Blues Ten FIDY Imperial Stout first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
